goal: Initialize or assimilate a project-local LLM wiki that preserves raw inputs and routes future answers through an index.

task_template.title: Initialize or assimilate LLM wiki
task_template.description: Create the llm-wiki namespace or process pending input files into structured wiki pages while preserving originals under raw.

doc.summary: Maintain an agent-readable project wiki with raw input preservation and index-based retrieval.
doc.scope: Initialize llm-wiki structure or assimilate only the files currently present in the configured input inbox.
doc.plan: Resolve wiki settings, inspect input files, preserve raw originals, update structured wiki pages, refresh index.md, append log.md, and verify the inbox is empty after assimilation.
doc.verify_steps: Confirm llm-wiki, raw, index.md, and log.md exist; confirm raw originals were preserved when inputs were processed; confirm index.md routes to relevant maintained pages.
doc.rollback_plan: Restore moved raw files and revert wiki page, index, config, and log changes created for the assimilation batch.
doc.findings: Record unresolved source conflicts, stale index entries, or inputs that could not be assimilated.

input_dir.description: Directory name under wiki_root used for incoming raw material.

wiki_root.description: The wiki namespace used for this task.

input_dir.description: The configured input directory name under wiki_root.

assimilated_files.description: Input files processed and preserved under raw.

updated_index.description: Path to the refreshed wiki index.

steps.summary: Read or create `llm-wiki/_config.json` with `wiki_root` and `input_dir`, defaulting to `llm-wiki` and `_input`.
List pending input files with path, type, size, and content summary before changing them.
Move original input files into `llm-wiki/raw/` using a date or batch grouping that prevents name collisions.
Extract reusable facts into topical wiki pages, avoiding duplicate dumps and marking gaps or uncertain claims.
Update `index.md` as the retrieval router and append `log.md` with the processed batch evidence.
Confirm the configured input inbox is empty after successful assimilation.
